title: scroll-keybind
description: This mod lets you assign hotkeys to scrolling the mouse wheel up and down
body:
## ✨ Features

- **Mouse Wheel Up** → Switches to the slot configured by the **"Scroll Up"** keybind  
- **Mouse Wheel Down** → Switches to the slot configured by the **"Scroll Down"** keybind  
- **Scrolling between hotbar slots is disabled**  
- **No config file needed** – Configure everything directly in Minecraft's controls menu  
- **Smart scrolling** – Normal scrolling still works in inventory screens and menus  
- **Flexible setup** – Assign any number key (1–9) to choose which slot to switch to  

---

## ⚙️ How It Works

1. Go to **Options → Controls → Key Binds**  
2. Find the entries **"Scroll Up"** and **"Scroll Down"**  
3. Assign number keys (1–9) to these keybinds:
   - Example:  
     - Set **"Scroll Up"** to key `5` → Scrolling up switches to hotbar slot 5  
     - Set **"Scroll Down"** to key `4` → Scrolling down switches to hotbar slot 4  
4. Scroll in-game to instantly switch to your configured slots  

---

## 📦 Requirements

- Minecraft **1.21.11**  
- Fabric Loader **0.19.2+**  
- Fabric API **0.141.3+**  

---
